text:
(In reply to Tomoaki AOKI from comment #5)
Hey,

I haven't tried patching anything since the server is a production server using GENERIC kernel and I don't think it's a good idea to play around with this over there.

As for the SMBv2 implementation, I'll keep my fingers crossed.
